skillGroups.label: Product Marketing
skillGroups.description: GTM strategy, product launches, and positioning - bridging customer insights and revenue. Taken programs from zero to ₹50L+ monthly revenue.

appliedAt.note: 400+ customer interviews → GenAI program launch → ₹50L+/month. Competitive analysis across 4–5 edtech players, A/B tested messaging → 495 paid enrolments/month.
GTM strategy for feature launches (employer matching, verified causes). Launched 2 handbooks → +7% fundraising conversion. In-app & push campaigns: 18% open rate.
Pricing gap analysis via support data → paid cohort deferral program → ₹25L+ incremental monthly revenue.

skillGroups.label: Content & Creative
skillGroups.description: Owns the content pipeline end-to-end - strategy, scripting, on-camera, editing, and distribution. Scaled brand channels 2–3× across Instagram, LinkedIn, and YouTube.

appliedAt.note: On-camera face of the brand - Reels, Shorts, long-form videos, podcasts, testimonials. Instagram 15K → 40K, YouTube 8K → 15K, 7% avg engagement rate.
Founder-led content: scripted, shot, and published LinkedIn content. Founder profile 5K → 12K, brand page 30K → 48K.
Art directed the NIGHTAMORE campaign - coordinated models, photographers, stylists → 2,000+ new Instagram followers.
Built brand identity from zero - content strategy, visual language, and community storytelling across Instagram and WhatsApp.

skillGroups.label: Marketing & Growth
skillGroups.description: Multi-channel campaign execution - email, paid, influencers, push, and WhatsApp - with performance tracking from first touch to conversion.

appliedAt.note: 16K+ leads/month across email, social, and community. MailModo lifecycle campaigns → 4K+ email leads/month. Peak organic reach: 21.1M views/month.
6-figure revenue on a ₹50K ad budget. 50+ influencer collabs, 200+ creatives, 20% follower growth. 50+ in-app/push campaigns: 18% open rate, 6% CTR.
Meta ads, influencer marketing, Instagram SEO, and email across 4 D2C and F&B brands. ₹8L+ in offline event sales driven by omnichannel campaigns.

skillGroups.label: Community & Research
skillGroups.description: 400+ customer interviews, real events, and community systems that turn audiences into advocates - not just followers.

appliedAt.note: 400+ customer interviews that directly shaped the GenAI program and deferral product. 70+ events (hackathons, meetups, masterclasses) with 7,000+ attendees.
Built a community from 0 → 7K+ members through 9+ offline events, WhatsApp groups, and email sequences. Niche audience, deep engagement.
7 medical awareness events, 2,000+ attendees. Secured Karnataka & Tamil Nadu government support through stakeholder management.
